data.title: Delta Air Lines, Domino's Pizza And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
FBI Busts $25M Crypto Fraud Ring: 18 Charged In 'Operation Token Mirrors' Involving Fake Token NexFundAI
data.description: The Federal Bureau of Investigation has charged 18 individuals and companies with fraud and manipulation following a sting operation involving a fake cryptocurrency token.

data.title: Former Pfizer Executives Ian Read And Frank D'Amelio Support Albert Bourla's Leadership Amid Starboard Activism: 'Will Deliver Shareholder Value'
data.description: Former Pfizer Inc CEO Ian Read and ex-CFO Frank D'Amelio have decided to distance themselves from the activist campaign led by Starboard Value at the pharmaceutical giant.

data.title: Tesla's Future Valuation: Analyst Pierre Ferragu Unveils Scenarios Ranging From $1.4 To $4.7 Trillion Based On FSD, Robotaxi Success
data.description: A leading Wall Street analyst has unveiled a comprehensive analysis of Tesla's potential in the robotaxi market, presenting five distinct scenarios that could shape the electric vehicle maker's future valuation.

data.title: Zoom Custom AI Avatars Can Now Deliver Messages To Your Team As You — Skipping Boring Remote Meetings Finally A Reality?
data.description: Zoom Video Communications is set to launch AI avatars that can deliver messages on behalf of users by mimicking their appearance and voice, with the feature expected to be available for purchase in 2025.
